prompt: Write a description for the Hyde Park Loop. Key points: starts at lower Hyde Park trailhead, climbs paved Hyde Park Road to the ski resort, returns on singletrack through ponderosa forest, 6 miles, 1400ft gain, popular on weekends, great early-season option since it's lower elevation

assertions.description: Uses conversational, direct voice rather than brochure-style prose
Mentions distance (6 miles) and elevation gain (1400ft) naturally in the text
Acknowledges the physical challenge honestly (quad pain, the climb) rather than just cheerleading
Includes the early-season/low-elevation advantage as useful practical info
Does NOT start with a generic opener like 'Nestled in...' or 'If you're looking for...'
